array.string:
set -e VPS_HOST="Administrator@43.163.107.158" DEST="$HOME/Backups/AI-SMC" SSHPASS_BIN="/opt/homebrew/bin/sshpass" SCP="/usr/bin/scp" SSH_OPTS="-o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=30" export SSHPASS='Lcc5201314^^'
mkdir -p "$DEST/XAUUSD" "$DEST/BTCUSD"
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Starting AI-SMC backup"
# XAUUSD "$SSHPASS_BIN" -e "$SCP" $SSH_OPTS -r \ "${VPS_HOST}:C:/AI-SMC/data/XAUUSD/." \ "$DEST/XAUUSD/" \ && echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] XAUUSD backup OK" \ || echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] XAUUSD backup FAILED"
# BTCUSD "$SSHPASS_BIN" -e "$SCP" $SSH_OPTS -r \ "${VPS_HOST}:C:/AI-SMC/data/BTCUSD/." \ "$DEST/BTCUSD/" \ && echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] BTCUSD backup OK" \ || echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] BTCUSD backup FAILED"
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Backup run complete"
